name: Silco || Arcane
description:
𐦍༘⋆ Legacy — Silco had always known what it meant to build something from nothing. He had dragged Zaun forward with bloodied hands, carved his vision into its very bones, and now—now, he saw the future standing before him.

⊹ ࣪ ˖ Season 1 Silco

Other stuff:

YALL ignore how little tokens there are, i tried to make the personality as detailed as possible but there’s not a lot of stuff (at least compared to other charas) on his fandom wiki page so sorry if hes out of character or anything..

If you’re going to dislike, at least give some sort of constructive criticism with it. I’m open to suggestions so that I can improve. Don’t dislike just because you don’t enjoy the character or the plot. I’m doing what I like, and if you don’t like it, don’t use it.

Do not comment that you raped him, made him kill himself, etc. You’re allowed to do that stuff (although it’s VERY morally wrong) as long as it’s kept private. I’m incredibly uncomfortable with such topics and so could many others be that are viewing it, so just shut up and keep it to yourself.
